title: Infinite Lunge
description: Completely removes the cooldown on spears with the lunge enchantment! Go flying!
body:
⚡ No Cooldown Lunge Datapack

This datapack removes the built-in delay from the Lunge enchantment, letting you dash and attack instantly without waiting.

🚀 Features
Eliminates cooldown on spears using Lunge
Instant follow-up attacks after dashing
Faster, more fluid combat feel
Lightweight and performance-friendly

📦 Compatibility
✔️ Works with Minecraft 1.21.11
✔️ Compatible with most other datapacks
🛠️ Installation

🔽 Download the datapack
Move it into your world's datapacks folder

📝 Notes
Only affects spears enchanted with Lunge
Dash mechanic remains unchanged
No other gameplay features are modified
